# BotAudit

> Automated quality testing for AI support bots — find out if your chatbot is actually helping customers or quietly failing them.

BotAudit is a web-based tool that automatically tests Zendesk Messaging chat widgets (and similar support bots) by sending configurable questions to the live widget, recording responses, checking consistency across multiple runs, and generating a detailed PDF audit report.

## What it does

- Runs a set of test questions against any live Zendesk Messaging widget
- Sends each question multiple times (1×, 3×, or 5×) to test consistency
- Captures screenshots of the bot conversation
- Measures response time per question
- Detects errors, no-responses, and inconsistent answers
- Generates a downloadable PDF report and CSV data export

## Who it's for

- Customer support managers who want to verify their Zendesk bot is configured correctly
- QA teams running regression tests after updating bot flows or knowledge base articles
- Agencies delivering Zendesk implementations who need proof-of-quality reports for clients
- Anyone who suspects their support bot is not answering customers correctly

## Pricing

- **Free demo**: 3 questions, 1 run each — no account or payment required
- **Paid audits**: one-time payment, no subscription. Price scales with number of questions and runs per question (typically a few dollars for a standard 20-question audit)

## How to use it

1. Enter the URL of any page that has a Zendesk Messaging chat widget
2. Choose a question set (20 default questions, or upload your own)
3. Configure the number of runs per question
4. Pay (or use the free demo)
5. Watch the live feed as BotAudit tests the bot in real time
6. Download the PDF report and CSV results

## Technology

BotAudit uses Playwright (headless Chromium) to interact with the real chat widget on the target page — the same way a human customer would. Each question is sent in a fresh browser session to prevent conversation memory from affecting results.

## Contact and access

- Website: https://botaudit.app
- No API currently available
- No account registration required — sessions are identified by a one-time ID
